overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a rainy, neon-lit cyberpunk city at night, featuring heavy rain, reflective wet streets, crowded sidewalks, and futuristic architecture with holographic advertisements. The footage appears to be from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing a journey from a covered walkway across a busy intersection and through an open plaza with food vendors.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: approaching the end of the covered walkway and reaching the street intersection

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered arcade toward the rainy street intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan waiting at the intersection ahead

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass covering the pedestrian walkway
large illuminated green advertisement screen mounted on the left wall
tall building facade with multiple vertical glowing advertisement banners
suspended traffic signal over the upcoming intersection

segments.scene_description: Walking under a massive concrete overpass in a cyberpunk city, with a large green holographic billboard on the left wall and neon signs visible ahead. The area is sheltered from the heavy rain, and pedestrians walk toward the upcoming intersection where a black sedan waits.

events.description: exiting the covered walkway and stepping onto the wet crosswalk
turning slightly right while crossing to align with the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt intersection among pedestrians with glowing umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person carrying a glowing purple umbrella crossing the street

entered.detail: rain-soaked asphalt crosswalk with reflective surface and yellow markings
tall building with illuminated windows and signage on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Moving from the sheltered walkway into the open intersection, crossing rain-slicked asphalt with other pedestrians. A person with a glowing purple umbrella crosses nearby, and the camera turns slightly to reach the opposite sidewalk as buildings with neon facades rise on the right.

events.description: stepping onto the opposite sidewalk and continuing along the street
vehicles passing by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various pedestrians and futuristic storefronts

notable_agents.action: cybernetically modified person with green hair walking past the camera

entered.detail: wet concrete pedestrian walkway with drainage grates
large advertisement billboard displaying 'EL GUAPO' text with a face
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
tall street lights illuminating the foggy rain

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wet sidewalk with the 'EL GUAPO' billboard visible on the right building and palm trees lining the left. The street is busy with moderate traffic and opposing pedestrians, including a person with distinctive green hair and cybernetic modifications.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with food vendors and outdoor seating

events.description: entering the open plaza area from the narrow sidewalk
approaching the food vendor kiosks and outdoor seating area

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza past outdoor seating and food vendor stalls

notable_agents.action: two people sitting at a high table with pink neon underlighting

entered.detail: large open pedestrian plaza with reflective wet pavement
high tables and stools with glowing pink and blue accent lighting
food stall with red 'BURRITO' signage and illuminated menu displays
large advertisement for Trauma Team medical services showing a person in uniform

segments.scene_description: Entering a spacious open plaza from the narrow sidewalk, featuring outdoor seating with neon-lit tables where people sit, and a prominent 'BURRITO' food kiosk in the center. The Trauma Team billboard is visible on the left as the camera explores the rain-soaked pedestrian area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban underpass into a wide, rain-soaked public plaza. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass beside a green holographic billboard, moving through a dry pedestrian area toward a busy intersection where a black sedan waits. As the camera leaves the shelter, it crosses the rain-slicked asphalt alongside a person with a glowing purple umbrella, with the environment shifting to an open street lined with neon facades. The scene then transitions along a wet sidewalk past palm trees and a person with green hair and cybernetic modifications, passing an El Guapo billboard on the right. Finally, the narrow walkway opens into a spacious plaza featuring neon-lit outdoor seating and a central burrito kiosk under the glow of a Trauma Team billboard.
